title: taraxacum eriopodum
intro: Taraxacum eriopodum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family, native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help to reduce swelling, relieve digestive issues, and support kidney function. The health benefits of Taraxacum eriopodum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and improve overall liver function, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum eriopodum are often consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being, particularly in cases of digestive issues and skin problems.
